action_surge.name: Action Surge
action_surge.description: Take one additional action on your turn.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Regain 1d10 + fighter level HP as a bonus action. Once per short rest.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Take one additional action on your turn. Once per short rest.

features.name: Martial Archetype
features.description: Choose a martial archetype.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Learn wizard cantrips and spells (third-caster).

features.name: Weapon Bond
features.description: Bond up to 2 weapons. Cannot be disarmed. Bonus action to summon.

modifiers.description: Cannot be disarmed, bonus action summon weapon.

features.name: Eldritch Knight
features.description: Chosen Path at Fighter Level 3

logbook.description: Leveled up to 3 (Fighter)! Max HP increased by 8.
Leveled up to 2 (Fighter)! Max HP increased by 8.
dude was born. A Level 1 Dragonborn Fighter, Sage background.

name: Kael Ashbrand

lay_on_hands.name: Lay on Hands
lay_on_hands.description: Restore HP from a pool of 25 (5 × Paladin level). Can also cure disease or neutralize poison for 5 points.

channel_divinity.name: Channel Divinity
channel_divinity.description: Oath of Vengeance: Vow of Enmity (bonus action, advantage on attacks vs one creature for 1 min) or Abjure Enemy (action, frighten one creature).

inventory.name: Plate Armor
inventory.description: Full plate armor forged in the furnaces of Neverwinter.

inventory.name: Shield
inventory.description: A sturdy steel shield emblazoned with a clenched fist.

inventory.name: Longsword
inventory.description: A finely balanced longsword, its blade etched with pale runes.

chest.name: Plate Armor
chest.description: Full plate armor forged in the furnaces of Neverwinter.

mainHand.name: Longsword
mainHand.description: A finely balanced longsword, its blade etched with pale runes.

offHand.name: Shield
offHand.description: A sturdy steel shield emblazoned with a clenched fist.

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: Detect the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: Pool of healing power: 5 HP × Paladin level. Can cure disease for 5 points.

features.name: Fighting Style: Defense
features.description: +1 AC while wearing armor.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: Expend spell slot to deal extra 2d8 radiant damage on a hit. +1d8 per slot above 1st (max 5d8). +1d8 vs undead/fiend.

features.name: Divine Health
features.description: Immune to disease.

features.name: Vow of Enmity
features.description: Bonus action: Choose a creature within 10 feet. You gain advantage on attack rolls against it for 1 minute.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: Cast warlock spells using Charisma. Slots recharge on short rest.

features.name: Hexblade's Curse
features.description: Bonus action: Curse a creature. +Prof bonus to damage, crit on 19-20, regain HP on its death.

modifiers.description: +3 damage to cursed target, crit on 19-20 vs cursed.

features.name: Hex Warrior
features.description: Use CHA instead of STR/DEX for one weapon you touch after long rest. Gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: Agonizing Blast (CHA to Eldritch Blast damage) and Repelling Blast (push 10 ft on EB hit).

features.name: Pact of the Blade
features.description: Create a pact weapon. It counts as magical for overcoming resistance. Can turn a magic weapon into your pact weapon.

features.name: Thirsting Blade
features.description: Attack with your pact weapon twice when you take the Attack action.

traits: Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm, immune to magical sleep)
personalityTraits: Speaks with a quiet intensity. Believes every oath must be honored or paid in blood.
ideals: Vengeance tempered by law. The wicked will face judgment.
bonds: Bound to a pact with a sentient blade called Dusk's Edge. Searches for the fiend who destroyed his order.
flaws: Cannot forgive betrayal. Will sacrifice allies if it means fulfilling a sworn oath.
notes:
⚠️ CRUCIBLE TEST CHARACTER — Paladin 5 / Warlock 5 (Hexblade)

Phase 1: Plate (18) + Shield (2) + Defense (+1) = 21 AC
Phase 2: Universal Unarmed Strike
Phase 3: Paladin slots + Pact Magic overlap
Phase 4: Pre-injected Bless effect
Phase 5: Shield + Absorb Elements reactions
quests: Find and destroy the fiend Xar'rathos.
people: Serena Brightwell (Cleric ally), Thane Ulf (mercenary contact)
places: Ruins of the Silver Sanctum, The Hexed Wastes

logbook.description: ⚗️ CRUCIBLE: Character seeded by stress-test script. Paladin 5 / Warlock 5 (Hexblade). All Edge Case Phases (1–5) should be exercisable.

externalEffects.name: Bless
externalEffects.description: +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws

modifiers.description: +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws (Bless)

bardic_inspiration.name: Bardic Inspiration
bardic_inspiration.description: Grant a creature an Inspiration die to add to ability check, attack, or save.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Double proficiency bonus for two chosen skill proficiencies.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Extra 1d6 damage once per turn with finesse/ranged weapons when you have advantage.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: A secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action.

features.name: Roguish Archetype
features.description: Choose a roguish archetype.

features.name: Swashbuckler
features.description: Chosen Path at Rogue Level 3

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You can cast bard spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: Inspire others through stirring words or music. Uses = CHA mod per long rest.

logbook.description: Leveled up to 4 (Bard)! Max HP increased by 6.
Leveled up to 3 (Rogue)! Max HP increased by 6.
